---
title: "Thousands of Scientists Are Leaving Twitter for Mastodon"
description: "Nature surveyed 170k+ scientists — Mastodon is the most popular alternative to Twitter."
author: synesis
date: "2023-08-16"
categories: [science, social media, Mastodon, links]
image: screenshot1.jpg
---

Nature surveyed 170+k scientists:

> "The most popular alternative social-media site that respondents mentioned opening accounts with was the free, open-source software platform Mastodon."

Thousands of scientists are cutting back on Twitter, seeding angst and uncertainty [[1]](#ref-1)

![](screenshot1.jpg)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_nature-scientists-mastodon-activity-7097618375924740096-n_vU).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "Thousands of scientists are cutting back on Twitter, seeding angst and uncertainty." *Nature*, 2023. <https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-023-02554-0>
